title: stelis cutucuensis
intro: Stelis cutucuensis, also known as the Cutucu orchid, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This orchid is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, the Cutucu orchid is often prepared by drying the plant and using it in teas, infusions, or as a powder to treat various ailments.
